res_1782889383192.rawText:
NAME: ALEX CHEN
EMAIL: alex.chen@genai-systems.io
ROLE: Senior AI & GenAI Engineer

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY:
Highly innovative Senior AI Systems Engineer with 5+ years of experience design and deploying enterprise-grade RAG pipelines, multi-agent frameworks, and high-performance microservices. Spearheaded deep neural integrations and optimized search latency by 40%. Exceptionally skilled at bridging LLMs with production workloads.

TECHNICAL SKILLS:
- Languages: Python, TypeScript, Java, Rust, SQL
- Frame-works & SDKs: FastAPI, Express, React, LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, TensorFlow
- Databases & Vectors: PostgreSQL, Redis, Pinecone, FAISS, Qdrant
- Infrastructure: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CircleCI

EXPERIENCE:
Senior AI Platform Engineer | Cognitive Solutions Inc. (2022 - Present)
- Architected an enterprise-grade retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system handling 1.5 million monthly search queries, optimizing context recall to 96%.
- Designed custom agent workflows using LangGraph and function calling to automate customer service triaging, reducing operations expenses by $180k.
- Oversaw transition of API endpoints from Flask to high-throughput FastAPI, which increased maximum transactions per second from 300 to 1400.

AI Engineer | Synthetix Technology (2020 - 2022)
- Built interactive fine-tuning pipelines using PyTorch for specialized legal and healthcare BERT model variants.
- Deployed scalable Docker cluster networks across AWS ECS clusters facilitating real-time semantic logs processing.

EDUCATION:
Master of Science in Computer Science | Stanford University (2020)
- Specialization: Artificial Intelligence & Distributed Databases. GPA: 3.9/4.0

CERTIFICATIONS:
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Professional
- Google Cloud Certified Professional Data Engineer

highlights: Modernized critical microservices increasing request speed by 35%.

projects.title: Intelligent Information Tracker
projects.description: A secure analytical suite tracking semantic logs effortlessly.

res_1782889664555.rawText:
Curriculum Vitae

Ankit Singh

AI / ML Engineer
aankithsingh03@gmail.com
+91-9650792383
linkedin.com/in/ankitsingh
github.com/ankitsingh
Profile

AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience building production-ready intelligent systems — from real-time anomaly detection platforms to GenAI-powered LLM applications and predictive deep learning models. Certified in GenAI by NASSCOM & Infosys. Skilled in Python, TensorFlow, Flask, and REST APIs, with a strong focus on delivering scalable and deployable AI-driven solutions.

Projects
GenAI Resume Analyzer
2025
Python · LangChain · Gemini API · Flask · FAISS ↗ GitHub
  • Architected a GenAI-powered resume analysis platform using LLM APIs, prompt engineering, and RAG pipelines for intelligent semantic scoring and career gap detection.
  • Built REST APIs for resume upload, vector-based matching, and AI-driven career recommendations with conversational feedback loop via Gemini API.
  • End-to-end pipeline: document ingestion → vector embedding → FAISS retrieval → response generation — fully deployable Flask application.
AI Groundwater Monitoring System
Oct – Dec 2025
Python · Flask · Scikit-learn · Pandas · SQLite ↗ GitHub
  • Developed a real-time analytics platform using Flask and Isolation Forest anomaly detection, improving risk detection accuracy by 30–40%.
  • Implemented threshold-based risk classification, geospatial dashboards (Leaflet.js, Chart.js), and automated SMTP email alerts for critical groundwater conditions.
  • Integrated backend REST APIs, SQLite database, historical trend analytics, and interactive mapping into a single deployable workflow.
Predictive Maintenance — Medical Infrastructure
Mar – Apr 2025
Python · TensorFlow · LSTM · Random Forest ↗ GitHub
  • Designed and trained Random Forest and LSTM models for equipment failure forecasting with end-to-end preprocessing and inference pipelines in TensorFlow.
  • Built an interactive scheduling dashboard that visualizes predicted maintenance dates and triggers proactive technician alerts to minimize device downtime.
  • Automated maintenance task allocation based on technician expertise — demonstrating production-ready ML workflow design.
Education
B.Tech — Computer Science & Engineering
Aug 2023 – Present
Lovely Professional University, Punjab, India  ·  CGPA: 6.02
Intermediate — CBSE
Jun 2021 – Mar 2022
Patna Doon Public School, Patna, Bihar  ·  68.6%
Technical Skills
Languages
Python C++ Java SQL
AI / ML
TensorFlow Scikit-learn Pandas NumPy OpenCV LSTM Random Forest Isolation Forest
GenAI & LLMs
LangChain Gemini API Prompt Eng. RAG FAISS
Backend & APIs
Flask FastAPI Django REST REST APIs
Cloud & Tools
Google Cloud Git Google Colab MySQL SQLite
Core CS
DSA OOPs DBMS OS Networks
Certifications
Gen AI — NASSCOM
SFJ Skills · Feb 2026
ChatGPT-4 Prompt Engineering

Build GenAI Apps (No-Code)
Infosys Springboard · Aug 2025
Master Generative AI & LLMs

match_1782890062367.jobDescription:
About the Role:
We are seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to architect high-capacity microservices on AWS, using FastAPI, LangChain, and LangGraph.

Requirements:
- Advanced expertise in Python, RAG architectures, and hybrid vector retrieval.
- Deployed multi-agent systems with trace telemetry.
- Skilled with Kubernetes, Docker, Pinecone databases, and real-time LLM evaluation metrics.
match_1782890062367.recruiterInsights: Highly suitable candidate for initial screen rounds. Excellent technical fundamentals with solid modern frontend competencies.
